creator: christoph.larsen@synalinq.com
text:
While building this port worked flawlessly for ages, I have encountered this for the past two days:
--------------------------------------%<------------------------------------
(pts/2)[root@mail:~]# cd /usr/ports/mail/qmail-ldap && make patch
===>  Found saved configuration for qmail-ldap-1.03.20120221_1
===>   qmail-ldap-1.03.20120221_1 depends on file: /usr/local/sbin/pkg - found
=> qmail-ldap-1.03-20060201-SRS.patch doesn't seem to exist in /var/ports/distfiles/qmail.
=> Attempting to fetch http://qmail-ldap-smtpauthuser.googlecode.com/svn/trunk/qmail-ldap-1.03-20060201-SRS.patch
fetch: http://qmail-ldap-smtpauthuser.googlecode.com/svn/trunk/qmail-ldap-1.03-20060201-SRS.patch: Not Found
=> Attempting to fetch http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/qmail/qmail-ldap-1.03-20060201-SRS.patch
fetch: http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/qmail/qmail-ldap-1.03-20060201-SRS.patch: Not Found
=> Couldn't fetch it - please try to retrieve this
=> port manually into /var/ports/distfiles/qmail and try again.
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make[1]: stopped in /basejail/usr/ports/mail/qmail-ldap
*** Error code 1
--------------------------------------%<------------------------------------
The manual instructions did not quite work, either, but this may be due to limited experience.
Any ideas what is wrong, apart from the fact the the URLs actually do not exist anymore?
Thanks a lot!
Chris
